overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban plaza in Night City. The player character walks past neon-lit food stalls, tilts their head up to admire towering glass skyscrapers, and continues to a waterfront area under an elevated highway where an NPC is fishing.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with elevated highway ramps

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza toward the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: walking away from the camera toward the highway

entered.detail: large concrete highway structure with multiple levels and palm trees growing around it
food vendor stall with bright purple neon lighting and menu displays
tall palm trees scattered throughout the plaza
yellow and teal information booth with advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through a sunlit futuristic plaza. An elevated highway ramp dominates the center distance, while a neon-lit food stall glows purple on the left. Palm trees and scattered pedestrians populate the concrete plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza looking up at corporate skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers against the bright sun
camera pans left to right showing the curved glass towers and surrounding architecture

agents.ego_description: tilting head up and panning to admire the towering glass skyscrapers and futuristic architecture

entered.detail: tall rectangular glass building with reflective windows and construction cranes on top
uniquely curved modern skyscraper with blue-tinted glass facade

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal towering glass skyscrapers against a bright blue sky, backlit by the sun. The view pans across the futuristic skyline showing curved and angular corporate towers. The ground-level elements are no longer visible as the camera focuses on the architecture above.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway along neon-lit commercial buildings

events.description: approaching the large digital billboard and illuminated stairs leading to the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking along the building facade with purple neon lights, approaching the waterfront stairs

notable_agents.action: descending the illuminated stairs toward the plaza

entered.detail: food vendor stall with bright purple neon lighting reappears as camera tilts down
building with orange curved architecture and teal neon trim
large screen displaying a news broadcast with a man reading a newspaper
concrete staircase with warm orange lighting on the steps leading upward

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to ground level and continues walking past the neon food stalls along an orange building facade. A large digital billboard showing a news broadcast comes into view on the right. The camera approaches illuminated stairs leading up to the elevated highway, with pedestrians descending toward the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront walkway under elevated highway bridge

events.description: moving from open plaza into covered waterfront area under the bridge
camera slows and stops near the fishing person, focusing on the waterfront scene

agents.ego_description: approaching the waterfront and observing an NPC fishing under the bridge while pedestrians walk up and down the stairs

notable_agents.action: sitting in a folding chair fishing by the water with a rifle resting nearby

entered.detail: calm waterway running under the bridge with concrete embankments
safety railing along the edge of the waterfront walkway
underside of the elevated highway casting shadows over the area
wooden cargo crates stacked near the stairway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a waterfront area sheltered under the elevated highway. The camera approaches a seated NPC fishing by the water while pedestrians ascend and descend the illuminated stairs in the background. Stacked crates and metal railings line the concrete walkway as the camera slows to observe the tranquil fishing scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sunlit futuristic plaza that eventually leads to a sheltered waterfront beneath an urban highway. It begins by moving through a concrete square populated by palm trees and pedestrians, passing a purple neon-lit food stall as an elevated highway ramp looms in the distance. The camera then tilts upward, leaving the ground behind to pan across a skyline of towering glass skyscrapers and angular corporate towers backlit by a bright blue sky. As the view returns to street level, the camera continues past an orange building facade and a large digital news billboard before approaching illuminated stairs where pedestrians descend from the highway. The scene finally transitions under the shadow of the elevated road to a tranquil waterfront, slowing down to observe a seated NPC fishing beside stacked crates and metal railings.
